---
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

::: page-header
# Call for Posters
:::

The conference invites abstract from faculty, students,scientists, researchers and industry professionals. Each abstract should be 200-250 words, presenting original academic or industrial research. Submissions should ideally align with the key themes and relevant areas outlined, though other topics are also welcome.
